category_sources: Official Manim Community docs describe programmatic generation of precise technical animations.
source_facts.description says Manim is an animation engine for explanatory math videos.
display_name_sources: Official Manim Community homepage and docs use the display name Manim.
docs_sources: Official Manim Community documentation site provides installation, tutorials, guides, reference manual, plugins, and changelog.
Official Manim Community homepage links to getting started documentation.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository ManimCommunity/manim describes itself as the community-maintained Python framework for mathematical animations.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official Manim Community homepage and official GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe Manim as Python-based programmatic animation tooling for technical concepts.
source_facts.description identifies explanatory math video animation.
